---
title: "Analytics and Big Data"
subtitle: "Governance of data analytics"
section_label: "Organizations"
session: "Session 10"
date: "2026-05-11"
---

# Learning objectives {data-state="hide-menubar"}

- Explain fundamental concepts of data analytics, and its role in data-driven organizations.
- Assess the operational and strategic implications of data analytics in organizations.

# TODO {data-stack-name="TODO"}
